playbooks.title: Accessibility Checklist for Error States
playbooks.summary: Error states require extra care for accessibility. Users who rely on screen readers, keyboard navigation, or high contrast modes are most likely to struggle when something goes wrong.

playbooks.title: Negativ Localization & Tone Guidelines
playbooks.summary: **Core tone for negative cases** (use this in every translation):

playbooks.title: Writing Error Messages
playbooks.summary: The four rules every error message must follow in Negativ.

playbooks.title: Negative UX ROI
playbooks.summary: How poor error handling, validation failures, and negative journeys quietly destroy revenue — and how Negativ fixes it. Includes industry benchmarks and a PM contribution template.

playbooks.title: Localization & Cultural Adapter
playbooks.summary: Tone rules and cultural notes for negative UX messages. Covers Vietnamese (vi-VN) formality patterns — Quý khách vs bạn — with expanded examples for auth, payment, and validation.
